name: content-locale-pair
description: Opens the matching locale content file in a split editor

scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run package
scripts.install: npm run build && cursor --install-extension out/content-locale-pair-0.0.4.vsix && cursor --reload

contentLocalePair.enabled.description: Automatically open paired files in a split editor

contentLocalePair.groups.description: Editor view groups used to match and pair files. Requires at least two groups.

viewGroupId.description: Target editor column (ViewColumn number, e.g. 1 = left, 2 = right)

rootFolder.description: Root folder for this group, relative to the workspace (e.g. test/en)

fileRegex.description: Regex matched against the file path relative to rootFolder

contentLocalePair.closePairOnClose.description: Close the paired locale file when one side of the pair is closed
